description: Query Apple iCloud data stored locally on macOS — Photos library storage analysis, with Contacts and more coming. All reads hit local SQLite databases directly; no network calls or iCloud API token required.

novel_features.name: Heaviest file finder
novel_features.description: List the top N heaviest files across all media types or filtered to photos/videos.

novel_features.name: Storage breakdown
novel_features.description: Show storage distribution by media type (photo/video) and by year.

novel_features.name: Direct SQLite access
novel_features.description: Reads Photos.sqlite directly in read-only mode — no Photos.app launch needed for queries.

novel_features.name: AppleScript delete
novel_features.description: Move items to Recently Deleted via Photos.app scripting using UUIDs from query output.
